settings.site_description: Professional B2B power solutions — UPS systems, PDUs, and power distribution products for data centers and enterprises.

products.name: UPS 3000VA Online Double-Conversion
products.summary: High-performance online UPS for critical IT infrastructure with rack-mount design.
products.description:
Overview

The UPS 3000VA Online Double-Conversion is designed for modern data center environments that demand reliable, efficient power infrastructure. Built with industry-leading components and backed by our comprehensive warranty program, this product delivers the performance and peace of mind your operations require.

Key Features

  • High efficiency operation reducing energy costs by up to 30%
  • Hot-swappable modules for zero-downtime maintenance
  • Advanced monitoring via SNMP v3, HTTP/HTTPS, and Modbus TCP
  • Compact form factor optimized for high-density rack environments
  • Wide input voltage range for compatibility with diverse power sources

Technical Specifications

Input Voltage: 200–240V AC, 50/60Hz single-phase or 380–415V three-phase
Output Capacity: As specified in product name
Efficiency: >96% at typical load
Operating Temperature: 0–40°C
MTBF: >200,000 hours

Applications

Ideal for UPS Systems deployments in enterprise data centers, colocation facilities, edge computing sites, and critical infrastructure environments. Suitable for both new installations and retrofit projects.

Why PowerTech?

With over 15 years of experience in critical power solutions, PowerTech provides expert consultation, professional installation, and 24/7 technical support. All products undergo rigorous quality testing and come with industry-leading warranties.

solutions.title: Data Centers Solutions
solutions.content: High-availability UPS systems with N+1 redundancy, custom power distribution architecture, 24/7 remote monitoring and alerting, and preventive maintenance programs designed for mission-critical IT infrastructure.

solutions.title: Healthcare Solutions
solutions.content: Medical-grade power protection ensuring zero downtime for life-saving equipment, compliant with healthcare facility regulations, with rapid-response support and maintenance programs.

solutions.title: Industrial Solutions
solutions.content: Rugged power solutions engineered for harsh manufacturing environments, with comprehensive surge protection, voltage regulation, and scalable architectures for growing operations.

solutions.title: Telecommunications Solutions
solutions.content: Carrier-grade power systems for telecom infrastructure, including -48V DC power plants, backup battery systems, and remote site monitoring for uninterrupted connectivity.

solutions.title: Financial Services Solutions
solutions.content: Enterprise power infrastructure for banks and financial institutions, meeting strict regulatory requirements for uptime, data integrity, and disaster recovery readiness.

solutions.title: Government Solutions
solutions.content: Secure and reliable power systems for government facilities, meeting federal procurement standards with comprehensive support, monitoring, and compliance reporting.

hero.title: Uninterruptible Power for Your Business
hero.subtitle: Enterprise-grade UPS systems, power distribution, and energy solutions tailored to your industry.

solutions_bar.title: Industry Solutions
solutions_bar.item_1_desc: Uninterruptible power for mission-critical IT infrastructure
solutions_bar.item_2_desc: Reliable backup power for medical equipment and facilities
solutions_bar.item_3_desc: Rugged power solutions for manufacturing and automation

cta.title: Need a Custom Power Solution?
cta.description: Our engineers can design a system tailored to your exact requirements.

story.body:
{site_name} has been a leading provider of uninterruptible power supply (UPS) systems and power management solutions for over 20 years. We serve businesses across data centers, healthcare, industrial, and government sectors.

Our mission is to ensure your critical operations never experience downtime. From small office setups to enterprise data centers, we deliver reliable, efficient, and scalable power continuity solutions.

hero.title: Our Services
hero.subtitle: End-to-end power continuity solutions from assessment to ongoing support.

item_1.title: Power Assessment
item_1.desc: Comprehensive analysis of your power needs and infrastructure requirements.

item_2.title: System Design
item_2.desc: Custom-engineered UPS and power distribution systems for your facility.

item_3.title: Installation
item_3.desc: Professional installation by certified technicians with minimal downtime.

item_4.title: Maintenance & Support
item_4.desc: 24/7 monitoring, preventive maintenance, and rapid response service.

content.title: Privacy Policy
content.body:
We respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information when you visit our website.

Information We Collect

We may collect the following information: name, email address, company name, and phone number when you submit an inquiry through our contact form. We also collect standard log data including IP address, browser type, and pages visited.

How We Use Your Data

Your data is used solely to respond to your inquiries and improve our website experience. We do not sell or share your personal information with third parties.

Data Retention

We retain inquiry records for 2 years. You may request deletion of your data at any time by contacting us.

Your Rights

You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data. To exercise these rights, please contact us at the email address below.

Contact

If you have questions about this privacy policy, please contact us at info@yourcompany.com.

content.title: Terms & Conditions
content.body:
1. Services

Our website provides product information and inquiry services. All product specifications are subject to change without notice.

2. Pricing

Prices displayed on this website are for reference only. Final pricing is confirmed through formal quotation and mutual agreement.

3. Intellectual Property

All content on this website, including text, images, and product documentation, is the property of the company and protected by applicable copyright laws.

4. Disclaimer

While we strive for accuracy, we do not guarantee that all product specifications are error-free. Actual products may vary from descriptions on this website.

5. External Links

This website may contain links to third-party websites. We are not responsible for the content or privacy practices of those sites.

6. Governing Law

These terms are governed by the laws of the jurisdiction in which the company is registered.

7. Contact

For questions about these terms, please contact us at info@yourcompany.com.
